entries.title: The Deep Age
entries.subtitle: Origin, Lore
entries.body: Velnorcan civilisation began in the Deep layer of Velundra, between 300 and 700km below the surface. Early Velnorca were social hunters who developed cooperative survival strategies, shared territory and communal child rearing, and eventually primitive tool use adapted for underwater use. The lack of land or any natural barriers between groups meant that rather then fragmenting into isolated tribes, Velnorca communities remained intact and gradually merged into a single civilization, although loosely unified. Early governance was informal, built around councils of the many elders, a structure that would later evolve into the modern system.
